ddls:
CREATE TABLE "insurance_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each insurance company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the insurance company */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information for the company */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance company (e.g., Life, Health, Auto) */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "premium_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each premium rate entry */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated insurance company */,
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated age group */,
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated gender */,
  "marital_status_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated marital status */,
  "premium_rate" REAL /* Premium rate charged */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance product (e.g., Auto, Health, Life) */,
  "coverage_amount" INTEGER /* Coverage amount for the policy */,
  "policy_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the policy (e.g., 1 year, 5 years) */,
  "effective_date" TEXT /* Date when the premium rate became effective */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_rates_marital_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("marital_status_id") REFERENCES marital_statuses ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_rates_age_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("age_group_id") REFERENCES age_groups ("age_group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_rates_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES insurance_companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_premium_rates_gender_id FOREIGN KEY ("gender_id") REFERENCES genders ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_groups" (
  "age_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age group */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range description (e.g., '17-Year-Old', '25-Year-Old') */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age in the age group */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age in the age group */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the age group was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the age group was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("age_group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_description" TEXT /* Description of gender (e.g., 'Male', 'Female') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the gender was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the gender was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marital_statuses" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marital status */,
  "status_description" TEXT /* Description of marital status (e.g., 'Single', 'Married') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the marital status was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the marital status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rate history record */,
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the premium rate */,
  "date_effective" TEXT /* Date when the rate became effective */,
  "previous_rate" REAL /* Previous premium rate before this effective date */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance product (e.g., Auto, Health, Life) */,
  "coverage_amount" INTEGER /* Coverage amount for the policy */,
  "policy_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the policy (e.g., 1 year, 5 years) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rate history record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the rate history record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_history_rate_id FOREIGN KEY ("rate_id") REFERENCES premium_rates ("rate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rate_analysis" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis record */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the insurance company */,
  "average_premium" REAL /* Average premium rate calculated */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date of the analysis */,
  "product_type" TEXT /* Type of insurance product (e.g., Auto, Health, Life) */,
  "coverage_amount" INTEGER /* Coverage amount for the policy */,
  "policy_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the policy (e.g., 1 year, 5 years) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the analysis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rate_analysis_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES insurance_companies ("company_id")
)
